title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER B — Mama heart slow-mo coffee sip
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the music block duration.
prompt: Slow-motion tight shot — soft pastel gradient backdrop (warm peach fading to soft cream), neutral. NO scene, NO furniture, NO Costco. @Mama in the CENTER, slow-motion, holds a small ceramic mug painted with pink hearts up to her lips, eyes closed, takes a slow blissful sip. A single tear glistens at the corner of her eye. She lowers the mug, opens her eyes, smiles a quiet, exhausted, full-hearted smile to the off-frame kids. Movements are TENDER and LOOPABLE: lift mug → sip → close eyes → smile → lower mug → look forward → return. Slow orbiting camera at adult-eye-level. Soft golden lighting. Solo shot — only Mama visible, no other people, no other faces, no dialogue (heart-beat moment), no audible speech, no audible music — silent render. The shot is designed to LOOP cleanly: Mama returns to the same mug-up-to-lips pose at second 0 and second 10.
